headline: Clear calendar and quiet comms — use today to drive the 'no ground truth' evals design doc forward before the next bi-weekly TR.

quick_wins.task: Fix Salesforce and Snowflake credential issues so Monday starts with working dashboards
quick_wins.why: Both integrations are broken (auth failures); metrics and escalation visibility is zero until resolved

must_make_progress.task: Draft or substantially advance the design doc for AE-1079 (Generated evaluations — no ground truth)
must_make_progress.why: Only active Jira ticket, no due date set but evals is a key 26.4 deliverable and next bi-weekly TR is ~April 1; having a reviewable doc ready positions you well

must_make_progress.task: Review the Big Rock Agents bi-weekly TR page and align your evals work with the latest OKR status
must_make_progress.why: Evals adoption is called out alongside MCP/tools in the demos section; ensure your design doc addresses current funnel/metric gaps noted in the TR

must_communicate_with.about: Align on technical approach for generated evaluations without ground truth — get their input before finalizing the design doc
Coordinate on evals pattern updates (DeepRAG, BatchTransform) and how no-ground-truth evals fit into the validation story

must_report_status.note: Proactively share draft status before the next bi-weekly TR so there are no surprises

flags: Salesforce integration is down (INVALID_LOGIN) — no visibility into customer escalations. Resolve credentials ASAP.
Snowflake integration is down (empty password) — no product metrics or funnel data available. Blocks MBR dashboard reads.
AE-1079 has no due date set — risk of it drifting; consider setting a target date today.
Autopilot is flagged Yellow/Risk in the latest TR — monitor for spillover impact on evals or your workstream.

outcomes.business_impact: No measurable business impact yet today; resolving credential issues and advancing the evals design doc will restore operational visibility and push a key 26.4 deliverable forward.
outcomes.product_adoption: Evals adoption metrics are currently unavailable due to broken Snowflake auth; advancing the no-ground-truth design doc is the highest-leverage adoption-driving work today.

slack_summary: Clear day with no meetings — best use of time is deep work on the no-ground-truth evals design doc (AE-1079), the only active Jira ticket. Top urgency: fix broken Salesforce and Snowflake credentials so you regain visibility into escalations and product metrics before Monday. Zero meetings today.
